title: Iliad, Book 15: Zeus Awakes
description: Book 15 of Homer's Iliad: Zeus Awakes.
introduction: Book 15 of the Iliad: Zeus Awakes. The Greek text is from the Venetus A manuscript (10th century), the oldest complete manuscript of the Iliad.

translation.original_text: Αὐτὰρ ἐπεὶ διά τε σκόλοπας καὶ τάφρον ἔβησαν.
translation.text: Zeus awoke and was furious. He sent Iris to order Poseidon from the field and Apollo to revive Hector. The Trojans surged forward again. Hector reached the ships and called for fire. Ajax defended the ships, thrusting with his great pike.
